name: Tentative Refund under Claim of Right

eligibility.description: Applies to taxpayers who have an overpayment of tax for the taxable year under the section 1341(b)(1) claim of right rules.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides an expedited 90-day refund for taxes paid on income reported in a prior year that the taxpayer was later forced to relinquish.
